title: Pradeep S. Mehta and Tasmita Sengupta | It’s Time For New Compact For The Welfare Of Labour All Across India
description: Far from being isolated incidents, these reflect a deeper pattern of industrial unrest, towards a structural default in India’s growth trajectory. Over the years, real wages have remained largely stagnant, with workers often earning nearly 25 per cent less while working up to 50 per cent more hours
